arts.ttl: Exclusive: When Everton plan to announce David Moyes as new manager with deal agreed
arts.sum: David Moyes has agreed a deal to become the new Everton manager 🚨🔙

arts.ttl: Sources: Moyes in line to replace Dyche at Everton
arts.sum: David Moyes is the frontrunner to return to Everton and replace Sean Dyche as manager, sources have told ESPN, with the 61-year-old the favoured candidate of the club's new owners to steer the team away from relegation danger.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho has already given Everton verdict on Premier League return after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Everton sacking Sean Dyche has seen Jose Mourinho installed as one of the early favourites to become their new manager months after speaking about a hypothetical Premier League return

arts.ttl: Everton owners' reason for rejecting Jose Mourinho as David Moyes set for emotional return
arts.sum: Everton have sacked Sean Dyche and former Toffees boss David Moyes is their top target to replace him, with Jose Mourinho not in contention for a Premier League return

arts.ttl: David Moyes now Everton's top target to replace Sean Dyche as new sack details emerge
arts.sum: The Toffees are considering bringing their former manager David Moyes back after new owners, The Friedkin Group, decided to sack Sean Dyche and talks will take place on Friday

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche’s grim realism served its purpose in Everton’s era of austerity — now it is time for ambition
arts.sum: With new owners and a state-of-the-art stadium on the way, Dyche’s tenure had reached a natural end

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche restored pride - but message to Everton media showed his time was up
arts.sum: Comment after Everton decided to sack Sean Dyche ahead of the FA Cup clash with Peterborough

arts.ttl: FA Cup rules explained - can Everton vs Peterborough go to extra time and penalties?
arts.sum: The FA Cup is back for the first time in 2025 as Everton headline Thursday's coverage of the world's oldest cup competition with a home game against Peterborough

arts.ttl: Every word Sean Dyche said to the ECHO after final Everton match in tense press conference
arts.sum: Sean Dyche speaks after Everton's Premier League clash with Bournemouth at the Vitality Stadium

arts.ttl: How to watch Everton v Peterborough on TV tonight - live stream details
arts.sum: Everton host Peterborough in the FA Cup third round this evening, with pressure mounting on Toffees boss Sean Dyche after five games without a win in all competitions
